content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is risk-off: Nifty -1.06%, IT -3.83%, VIX +3.77% to 19.3, with weakness across sectors. Defensives (FMCG, pharma) holding relatively but giving back gains. Book is already 67% deployed with -0.35% on the day; priority is position management and tightening SLs, not new adds.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "new_target": 85.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position underwater -6.7% but Q4 results were strong (PAT +35%, NII +18.8%, GNPA improved, HDFC raised TGT to 90). PSU Bank index weak today causing pullback from 52w high. CMP 76 sits just above SL 75 which is also S2 76.95 area — keeping SL tight at 75 (no loosening). Lowering target from 88 to 85 to be more realistic given exhaustion near 52w high. Will exit if SL hit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +3.9% on strong Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, disbursements +36%). Trailing SL up from breakeven 984 to 995 (just above today's low 995 and pivot 989) to lock in small gain while giving room to run toward 1100 target. Risk/position now ~2.5% × 10% = 0.025% portfolio risk. Target intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge against geopolitical/Iran risk. Down -1% but VIX rising +3.8% supports gold thesis. SL 119 (~5% below entry) appropriate for ETF volatility. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4 (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27%, EBITDA margin 26.3%). Stock printed 52w high 1430 today then pulled back to 1414 — defensive bid intact in weak market. Tightening SL up from 1400 to 1405 (still below entry by 0.5%) to reduce risk while letting position breathe. Target 1500 more realistic than 1520 given vertical run already done."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high zone with strong provisional Q4 (advances +25%, deposits +23%). Q4 audited results Apr 25-27 = binary event risk. Keeping SL at entry 1049 (breakeven protection — note this is no-op vs current 1049 SL but I want to flag target reduction). Lowering target from 1150 to 1130 given event risk and stretched RSI."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 4,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results Apr 29 — binary event in 3 trading days. P&L only +0.8% so cannot trail SL above entry yet. SL at 675 (~0.9% below entry) already very tight — appropriate given binary event risk. Will reassess pre-results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.9% as defensive sells off intraday. Q4 results Apr 30. SL 2260 (~4.7% below entry) gives room for results. Position only 4.7% of portfolio so risk budget OK. Holding through results given FMCG defensive bid."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.3%. SL 388 (~4% below entry) appropriate. Q4 results May 15 — well outside max hold window. Energy sector mildly weak today. Will reassess if breaks 396 support."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 print but stock down -1% today on weak market tape. Already have 3 financial-sector positions (MAHABANK, PNBHOUSING, AUBANK) — adding ICICIBANK would breach cluster discipline. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ABSLAMC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT -18% YoY (treasury MTM hit), CIO Mahesh Patil resigned (key-person risk), lagging AMC peers. Today's volume spike likely reaction to weak print. Bearish supplementary read. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GVT&D",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "P/E 189, 5-day vertical move +17% in a month, ATH today with limited 5% upside to MOFSL TGT 4740. Chasing parabolic moves on a risk-off day = worst R/R. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma index -1.37% today giving back yesterday's gains; US tariff overhang on heavyweights (Sun, Cipla, Dr Reddy's). Already have GRANULES pharma exposure. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HSCL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Top gainer +8.3% — chasing momentum on a risk-off VIX-up day is poor R/R. Book already 67% deployed."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "EMCURE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Pharma defensive bid losing steam (sector -1.37% today). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COCHINSHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Defence theme up +5% — chasing breakouts on risk-off day. Capital constrained (Rs 125k remaining deployable, 67% already deployed). Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Same as COCHINSHIP — defence breakout chase, no capacity given deployment hysteresis rule."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Relative strength anomaly in worst sector (IT) is interesting but likely a results gap with limited follow-through. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CLEAN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "12.8x volume anomaly without clear catalyst — too speculative. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ATUL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Specialty chem rotation interesting but no capacity. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HUDCO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already have PNBHOUSING in financials cluster. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Near-flat today, no clear breakout signal. Pass on a risk-off day."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Upstream beneficiary but no capacity given deployment hysteresis. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Already have NTPC in energy. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "MRPL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "Refining margins squeezed by high crude. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "No capacity, deployment hysteresis. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONESOURCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "reasoning": "No capacity. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 75.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 75 already tight; will exit on break of S2 76.95/SL 75."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 995.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing up from 984 entry to 995 to lock in gain on +3.9% move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — keep wide SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Tightening SL slightly toward entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1049.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven ahead of Q4 audited results event risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 675.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL ahead of Apr 29 results — appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2260.00,
      "reasoning": "Wide SL for FMCG holding through Apr 30 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Position only -1.3%; cannot trail above entry yet."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ICICIBANK is the highest-quality fresh entry candidate but blocked by financials cluster. GVT&D, defence names (COCHINSHIP/GRSE) deserve watch for healthy pullback rather than chase. CLEAN volume anomaly worth tracking for news disclosure.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 67% deployed with 8 positions — at the deployment hysteresis threshold. Today's market is risk-off (VIX +3.8%, IT -3.8%). Priority is SL management and event-risk navigation: AUBANK results Apr 25-27, GRANULES Apr 29, HUL Apr 30 are clustered binary events in next 5 days. Holding cash buffer of 33% is prudent. No new entries today — quality over activity."
}
